data.title: Inventors from High Point, N.C., developed MAGIC TOUCH WOUND CARE solution to heal deep wounds and pressure sores.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 29, 2026, a new innovation in wound care was introduced by inventors from High Point, North Carolina. The invention, known as MAGIC TOUCH WOUND CARE, aims to provide a better solution for healing deep wounds and pressure sores. The motivation behind the invention stemmed from personal experience, with one of the inventors sharing that their grandfather suffered from pressure sores due to neglect at a nursing facility. The new product is designed to address these issues and improve the healing process for patients.

data.title: Therap Connect streamlines data collection for Arlyn Wheelchair Scales, aiding in care documentation - Jan 29, 2026.
data.description: In Torrington, Connecticut on January 29, 2026, Therap Services, a top provider of HIPAA-compliant electronic documentation solutions for Long-Term Services and Supports (LTSS), Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS), and human services sectors, is making strides. The company leads nationally in these areas, serving numerous organizations.

data.title: Nominations for 2026 Wealth Management Industry Awards open, with expanded categories highlighting innovation.
data.description: The announcement was made in New York on January 29, 2026, about the enrichment of categories focusing on innovation in partnerships, advisor intelligence, RIA leadership, recruiting, and modern storytelling. This development was revealed by Wealth Management, a prominent media and events platform catering to financial advisors and wealth management professionals.

data.title: Army & Air Force Exchange Service stores to stay open worldwide during gov. shutdown on Jan. 31 for military personnel, families, retirees, vets, and civilians.
data.description: In Dallas on January 29, 2026, it was announced that Army & Air Force Exchange Service outlets globally will continue operations for service members, military families, retirees, disabled Veterans, and Department of War and Coast Guard civilians in the event of a potential federal government shutdown on January 31.

data.title: Egan-Jones analysis offers risk lessons to investors to avoid credit failures, titled "Lessons Unlearned Avoiding the Next Tricolor."
data.description: On January 29, 2026, a financial analysis report titled "Lessons Unlearned: Avoiding the Next Tricolor" was published by Egan-Jones in New York. This analysis aims to assist institutional investors and risk managers in recognizing potential issues in transactions before significant losses occur. The report emphasizes the importance of early detection to prevent similar incidents to Tricolor, providing insights to mitigate risks effectively.

data.title: Covalent in Sunnyvale expands ISO/IEC 17025 accreditation to 60 metrology services, with headquarters in Silicon Valley.
data.description: In Sunnyvale, California on January 29, 2026, a prominent provider of advanced materials characterization and failure analysis, Covalent, with its headquarters in Silicon Valley, revealed a significant development in its ISO/IEC 17025 accreditation. This expansion has increased their total number of accredited certifications to sixty.

data.title: Mondi Products™ introduces Avara Technology: a sustainable horticultural innovation promoting safety and environmental responsibility.
data.description: A cutting-edge food-grade material is establishing a new benchmark for safety, efficiency, and eco-consciousness. Introduced by Mondi Products™ from Vancouver, BC, on January 29, 2026, this innovative manufacturer is known for its patented 1020 Propagation Tray and Mini Greenhouse Humidity Dome.

data.title: TRC to present innovative grid solutions at DISTRIBUTECH 2026, addressing utility challenges. Location: Windsor, Conn. Date: Jan. 29, 2026.
data.description: TRC Companies, Inc. (TRC), a leading global professional services firm, is set to offer practical solutions for pressing issues in the utility sector. Headquartered in Windsor, Connecticut, the company will present actionable strategies to address these challenges. As of January 29, 2026, TRC will leverage its expertise in strategy, consulting, engineering, and applied technologies to drive innovation and efficiency in the industry. Stay tuned for updates on how TRC plans to navigate the evolving landscape of utilities.

data.title: cbdMD enhances regulatory science platform for cannabinoid evaluation pathways; aims to integrate and expand. Jan. 29, 2026. (NYSE: YCBD)
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina, CBD company cbdMD, Inc. (NYSE American: YCBD) revealed on Jan. 29, 2026, their plan to enhance their regulatory science, safety, and intellectual property resources. This initiative aims to consolidate and strengthen their position as a top player in the hemp-derived wellness industry.

data.title: IEEE predicts top tech trends for 2026: AI to reduce routine work, drive autonomous power, and adaptive therapeutics.
data.description: In 2026, advancements in AI technologies are expected to have a profound impact by substantially decreasing routine tasks, fostering autonomous capabilities, and introducing adaptive treatments. The developments are set to take place in Los Alamitos, California by January 29, 2026. This progress is endorsed by IEEE, which is the globe's biggest technical professional body and a nonprofit committed to progressing science and technology.

data.title: Microsoft stock plunges 12%, worst day since March 2020, erasing $400 billion in market cap as tech indices dropped.
data.description: After the Federal Reserve meeting, Wall Street experienced a volatile session with major tech-heavy indices seeing significant drops due to a historic 12% plunge in Microsoft Corp. (NYSE: MSFT) shares. Despite beating earnings and revenue expectations, Microsoft's stock fell due to concerns about slowing Azure cloud growth and cautious guidance on AI monetization. This selloff led to a loss of approximately $400 billion in market capitalization. The S&P 500 dropped 1% to 6,900 points, while the Nasdaq 100 lost 300 points or 1.6%. However, Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) bucked the trend, surging more than 8% after strong fourth-quarter results and optimistic first-quarter revenue guidance. International Business Machines Corp. (NYSE: IBM) also climbed 6% following better-than-expected quarterly results. Tech stocks faced a weak session, with ServiceNow Inc. (NYSE: NOW) experiencing heavy declines. Overall, apart from Meta Platforms and IBM, most tech stocks saw losses.

data.title: Bitcoin price falls to $83K, hitting two-month low after dropping nearly 6% amidst gold and silver retracement from record highs.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin experienced a sudden drop of approximately 6%, reaching its lowest point in two months. This decline coincided with a rapid retracement in the prices of gold and silver from their record highs.

data.title: UAE defense market size to grow from $25.1B in 2026 to $30.2B in 2030 at 4.7% CAGR, report highlights key players.
data.description: A report titled "The UAE Defense Market - Size and trends, budget allocation, regulations, key acquisitions, competitive landscape and forecast, 2025-2030" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The UAE is expected to witness a rise in its defense budget from $25.1 billion in 2026 to $30.2 billion by 2030, showing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.7%. The report offers insights into the market size projection and the estimated growth rate for the upcoming five years. It covers various aspects of the UAE Defense Market.
